eval_feedback.overall: The response is exceptionally thorough and passes all 10 assertions. It provides the exact command with the correct --journeys flag and internal ALB URL, uses environment variables for credentials (no hardcoding), and comprehensively explains all 6 phases of the acquisition lifecycle journey (intake, document generation, checklist, revision, finalize, export). The screenshot count (25-35+), runtime comparison to other journeys, and cost estimate are all clearly documented with detailed breakdowns.
